title: Sensitive Information Disclosure in "_internal" index in Splunk Enterprise
description: Sensitive Information Disclosure in "_internal" index in Splunk Enterprise
solution:
Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to versions 10.2.0, 10.0.2, 9.4.7, 9.3.9, 9.2.11, or higher.
